title: IL Cobblemon
description: This is the Immortal Legends Cobblemon modpack!
body:
![Immortal Legends Cobblemon title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe5cd1ca0a3df9bbffbf9c0999201dd3dba7881.png)
This is the Immortal Legends Cobblemon modpack, a modpack I made for me and my friends that focuses on Cobblemon and adding in new and fun boss fights while also adding in a bunch of mods that just add a bit more fun to your game

This Pack features over 100 mods that adds:
- Cobblemon: meggas, legendaries, and other adjustments 
- New Bosses
- New and overhauled dungeons
- Brand new ways to travel by land, sea, and sky
- The Aether and deep Aether
- New items for those who like to collect
- e4mc, chat heads, and simple voice chat for easy and better multiplayer
- and a few other surprises ;)
